criteria.name: CSV adapter loads PEINP archives
criteria.evidence: csv_adapter.py: CSVAdapter.load() detects PEINP schema via _detect_csv_schema(), normalizes columns via rename_columns(), parses Date+Time to timestamp_utc. Test loads real PEINP CSV, verifies DataFrame with station/timestamp_utc columns.

criteria.name: CSV adapter loads ECCC Stanhope
criteria.evidence: csv_adapter.py: _load_eccc_csv() parses Date/Time (LST) column, skips flag/meta columns, sets station='stanhope'. Test loads real ECCC CSV, verifies station == 'stanhope'.

criteria.name: XLSX adapter loads Greenwich Excel
criteria.evidence: xlsx_adapter.py: XLSXAdapter.load() auto-detects header row, filters unit rows via _is_date_value(), uses openpyxl engine. Test loads real XLSX, verifies non-empty DataFrame.

criteria.name: XLE adapter loads Stanley Bridge Solinst
criteria.evidence: xle_adapter.py: XLEAdapter.load() parses XML via ElementTree, extracts channel headers (Ch1/Ch2), maps 'level' → water_level_m and 'temperature' → water_temperature_c. Test loads real .xle file.

criteria.name: JSON adapter loads Licor Cloud API
criteria.evidence: json_adapter.py: JSONAdapter loads nested sensor data, maps device serial → station via devices.json, converts ms timestamps to UTC, applies unit conversions (m/s → km/h for wind). Test loads real Licor JSON.

criteria.name: All adapters output canonical schema
criteria.evidence: Test iterates all entries in ADAPTER_REGISTRY, loads real files for each format, verifies station and timestamp_utc present in output. All 4 adapters pass.

criteria.name: wind_speed_kmh derived from wind_speed_ms (×3.6)
criteria.evidence: column_maps.py:derive_wind_speed_kmh() implements wind_speed_ms * 3.6 when wind_speed_kmh absent. Called by CSVAdapter and XLSXAdapter. JSONAdapter handles its own m/s→km/h conversion. Test skips (no processed data yet) but implementation is verified by code review.

criteria.name: Water-level columns for coastal stations
criteria.evidence: xle_adapter.py maps Solinst channel 'level' → water_level_m and 'temperature' → water_temperature_c. column_maps.py includes Water Level/Water Pressure/Water Temp mappings. Test is informational (no processed data yet).

criteria.name: accumulated_rain_mm excluded from output
criteria.evidence: column_maps.py SKIP_COLUMNS drops accumulated_rain_mm. json_adapter.py explicitly skips 'Accumulated Rain' measurementType. XLSX SKIP_PREFIXES drops 'Accumulated Rain' headers. Triple-layer exclusion.

summary: Phase 2 (Format Adapters) PASS. All 4 adapters (CSV, XLSX, XLE, JSON) implemented and functional. Exit gate: 8 passed, 1 skipped (skip gated on processed data from Phase 3). AC-FMT-7/8/9 have correct implementations but tests are deferred to Phase 3 when processed data exists. No issues found.
